question: Why was I charged a late fee?
expected_answer: A late fee of Rs. 50 applies if payment is not received within 15 days of the bill date.

question: Why does my bill show a separate tax line?
expected_answer: GST is applied at 18% on the base plan charge and shown as a separate line item.

question: When are roaming charges billed?
expected_answer: Roaming charges are billed at the end of the billing cycle in which they were incurred.

question: Can I dispute a charge on my bill?
expected_answer: Yes, charges can be disputed within 30 days of the bill date and are held pending review.

question: How is my base charge billed?
expected_answer: The base charge is billed monthly in advance according to the selected plan.
